basic_details.job_title: IIIT-Surat Assistant Professor Grade-II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 15 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology, Surat (IIIT-Surat)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Information Technology, Surat (IIIT-Surat) Assistant Professor Grade-II Recruitment 2026 Notification has been released on 16 April 2026 on the official website of IIIT-Surat. A total of 15 vacancies have been announced through the IIIT-Surat Assistant Professor Grade-II Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in relevant discipline with first class at both B.Tech/BE and M.Tech/ME.
qualification.details: Assistant Professor (CSE): PhD in relevant discipline with first class at both B.Tech/BE and M.Tech/ME.

salary_details.details: The salary includes pay in the pay level as per 7th CPC, HRA, Dearness Allowance, Transport Allowance, DA on TA, Child Education Allowance, and NPS-Employer's Contribution as per Gol/Institute Rules from time to time. Pay Level: Level-10 of 7th CPC pay matrix.

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications and shortlisting Screening test/presentation/interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIIT-Surat Assistant Professor Grade-II Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIIT-Surat to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIIT-Surat Assistant Professor Grade-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the hard copy of the application is 15th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches IIIT-Surat by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor Grade-II post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD in a relevant discipline with first-class marks at both the B.Tech/BE and M.Tech/ME levels.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Professor Grade-II position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 15 vacancies for the Assistant Professor Grade-II post at IIIT-Surat.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the Assistant Professor Grade-II post?
faq.answer: The salary is as per Level-10 of the 7th CPC pay matrix, along with other allowances as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for UR/OBC/EWS candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for UR, OBC, and EWS candidates is Rs. 2000/-.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any application fees for SC/ST/PwDs/Female candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST/PwDs/Female candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the scrutiny of applications, shortlisting, and a screening test/presentation/interview.

faq.question: Q8. How should candidates apply for this position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to fill the application form online via Google Form and also submit a hard copy of the duly signed application with required documents via Speed Post or Courier.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation mentioned for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly mention age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed advertisement.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the apply online link in the "Important Links" section of this article.
